creator: draco@marino.st
text:
games/formido master site defined as:
MASTER_SITES=	http://koti.mbnet.fi/lsoft/formido/ \
		http://mirror.amdmi3.ru/distfiles/

The first site, "http://koti.mbnet.fi/lsoft/formido/" doesn't contain any distfiles.

Fix: 

remove "http://koti.mbnet.fi/lsoft/formido/" from the list of distfiles.
